agentDispatch.instruction: Use Codex collaborative mode (`codex --collab`) to dispatch this as a sub-task. Pass the full prompt below to the collaborative agent.
agentDispatch.concurrentNote: Dispatch up to 3 collaborative agents concurrently when processing file batches.

agentDispatch.instruction: Invoke the agent as a skill using `@ua-{agent-name}`. The agent skill will handle the analysis and write results to the intermediate directory.
agentDispatch.concurrentNote: Invoke up to 3 agent skills concurrently when processing file batches.

agentDispatch.concurrentNote: Dispatch up to 3 agents concurrently when processing file batches.
